title: setaria tejucensis
intro: Setaria tejucensis, also known as Brazilian bristle grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Setaria tejucensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used as a tea, tincture, or powder to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
